name: Chocolate-Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate, sugar, and soy milk in a heatproof bowl set over a larger pot of water. Cook over low heat until the chocolate is smoothly melted.
2. Stir in the oatmeal.
3. Drop the peanut butter in by rounded teaspoonfuls. Swirl it around until evenly distributed but not blended in.
4. Line a small, shallow baking dish with wax paper. Press the chocolate mixture into the dish using the back of a spatula.
5. Refrigerate for several hours until chilled and firmly set. Cut into 1-inch squares.
